subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá! Hearken unto the Call of God, the Lord of Names, which hath been raised from the direction of the snow-white Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل البهاء ان استمعوا ندآء الله مالک الاسماء الذی ارتفع من شطر البقعة البیضاء
subcodes.subjects: @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
